title: REINDEX fails on a UNIQUE index on the GLOB operator of a REAL column
poc: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX t1x1 ON t1(a GLOB b);
key_bug_features: REINDEX fails on UNIQUE index with GLOB operator
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a TEXT, b REAL);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX t1x1 ON t1(a GLOB b);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE a GLOB '0';
